result.stdout:
missael-gen — Entity Generator for .NET Clean Architecture

USAGE
  missael-gen <command> <entityName> <projectBase> [options]

COMMANDS
  entity    Generate all files for an entity and register the module
  remove    Delete generated files and clean up registrations

OPTIONS
  --props   <Name:Type,...>   Additional entity properties
  --group   <GROUP_NAME>      Swagger group name (default: DAPPER)

EXAMPLES
  # Generate entity with properties
  missael-gen entity Order Project9 --props Number:string,Price:decimal --group DAPPER

  # Generate entity with no extra properties
  missael-gen entity Customer Project9 --group CRM

  # Remove a feature
  missael-gen remove Order Project9
